## Approval Tier

- [ ] Tier 0: observe/report only
- [ ] Tier 1: low-risk local/docs/tests/audit change
- [ ] Tier 2: product/code change, merge/deploy requires Austin approval
- [ ] Tier 3: pricing/privacy/credential/release/public-positioning change, approval required before implementation

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run audit:content`

- [ ] Site tests/build, if applicable:
- [ ] Manual QA, if applicable:
